steps.//: The plugin and theme are mounted into /wordpress/wp-content/... via the --mount flag in runCLI, so no installPlugin/installTheme step is needed here. We only need to activate them.
Seed tutorial content. Mirrors the logic in blueprint.json but writes the result to an option that tests can assert on via the WP REST API or by loading a debug page.
steps.code: <?php define('WP_USE_THEMES', false); require_once '/wordpress/wp-load.php'; do_action('plugins_loaded'); do_action('init'); try { if (!file_exists('/wordpress/wp-content/plugins/graphic_data_plugin/includes/admin-tutorial-content.php')) { update_option('blueprint_setup_notice', 'error: File admin-tutorial-content.php not found.'); } else { require_once '/wordpress/wp-content/plugins/graphic_data_plugin/includes/admin-tutorial-content.php'; if (class_exists('Graphic_Data_Tutorial_Content')) { $tutorial = new Graphic_Data_Tutorial_Content(); if (method_exists($tutorial, 'create_playground_tutorial_content')) { $tutorial->create_playground_tutorial_content(); update_option('blueprint_setup_notice', 'success'); } else { update_option('blueprint_setup_notice', 'error: Method create_playground_tutorial_content not found.'); } } else { update_option('blueprint_setup_notice', 'error: Class Graphic_Data_Tutorial_Content not found after require.'); } } } catch (Throwable $e) { update_option('blueprint_setup_notice', 'error: ' . $e->getMessage() . ' in ' . $e->getFile() . ' on line ' . $e->getLine()); } ?>

steps.//: Drop a tiny mu-plugin that (a) exposes blueprint setup status at a known URL for tests to assert, and (b) makes PHP errors loud during tests by enabling WP_DEBUG display.
steps.data:
<?php
// Test-only helpers. Do NOT ship in production.

// Fail loud on PHP errors during tests.
if (!defined('WP_DEBUG'))         define('WP_DEBUG', true);
if (!defined('WP_DEBUG_DISPLAY'))  define('WP_DEBUG_DISPLAY', true);
if (!defined('WP_DEBUG_LOG'))      define('WP_DEBUG_LOG', true);
@ini_set('display_errors', '1');
error_reporting(E_ALL);

// Endpoint: /?graphic_data_test_status=1 -> JSON { setup: 'success'|'error: ...' }
add_action('init', function () {
    if (!isset($_GET['graphic_data_test_status'])) return;
    header('Content-Type: application/json');
    echo json_encode([
        'setup'        => get_option('blueprint_setup_notice', 'MISSING'),
        'active_plugins' => get_option('active_plugins', []),
        'stylesheet'   => get_option('stylesheet'),
        'template'     => get_option('template'),
    ]);
    exit;
});
